en: For example, how many of you still have your cell phones on you right now?
Great. Double check, make sure you still have them on you. I was doing some shopping beforehand.
Now, you've looked at them probably a few times today, but I'm going to ask you a question...
ko: 좋아요. 다시 확인해보세요. 아까 쇼핑을 좀 했거든요 오늘 아마 여러 번 봤겠지만 질문을 하나 할게요
